evidences.title: Monad to raise $188m in Coinbase's first public token sale - DL News
evidences.content: On Monday, the upcoming blockchain project announced it will sell $188 million worth of tokens to retail investors on Coinbase through a newly announced token sale platform. According to Monad, the sale will help decentralise the project by distributing its MON token more broadly among its community. For retail investors, it’s another opportunity to get exposure to a high-risk bet in an unlaunched crypto project. Monad has previously raised a total of $248 million over multiple funding rounds, according to Tracxn, a market data platform. This includes a $19 million seed round in early 2023, and a $225 million Series A round that closed in March 2024. [...] Last month, rival blockchain project MegaETH sold $50 million worth of its native token at a $1 billion valuation through Sonar, a token sale venue tied to early-stage investing platform Echo. The sale’s popularity vastly exceeded expectations, attracting over $300 million worth of pledged capital. Monad’s token sale ups the ante by valuing the project at $2.5 billion. Some 7.5% of the MON token’s 100 billion starting supply is up for grabs at $0.025 per token. The MON token is used to pay gas fees on Monad. Once the blockchai...

evidences.title: Monad public sale total commitments: More than $1B, bet - KuCoin
evidences.content: Would I have joined the sale myself if I could? Yeah, because I still think it has upside potential compared to $2.5b. Unfortunately, I am in Europe and not qualified. [...] Monad public sale total commitments: More than $1B, bet: NO at 58c. Easiest would be to compare it with MegaETH which raised $1,4b at a $1b val, and we have to remember that the valuation is higher, and that the sentiment was better at that time of MegaETH + that the whole Europe is banned from this sale. So far $87m has been raised, and the goal is $187.5m. It will definitely be oversubscribed, but the question is just by how much. The ICO price is closer to the pre-market price, and I think people will be more skeptical about apeing hard. On the bull side for Monad, though they have Coinbase in their back + the sale lasts for 5 more days. Absolutely not a sure bet at all, but IMO it could be worth a try. [...] KuCoin union-icon language_currency source avatar # Share Icon Share Icon Share Icon Share Icon Share Icon Share Icon Copy This is the logo of the coin.

evidences.title: Coinbase Debuts MON Sale as Monad Finalizes Major Airdrop
evidences.content: Interest exceeded expectations despite a fragile market environment. Applications came from over eighty-five thousand verified buyers, pushing total committed capital far above the available supply. At the fixed price of 0.025 USDC per MON, the sale valued Monad at a fully diluted market capitalization of nearly one billion dollars. While the valuation sparked debate among analysts, demand for early exposure to a high-performance EVM-compatible layer 1 proved strong. The launch also arrives at a time when many U.S.-based traders have had limited access to primary token offerings, giving MON outsized visibility. [...] ## Monad Confirms Airdrop for 200,000+ Users To complement the sale, Monad is distributing more than three percent of MON’s supply to early users and contributors. The airdrop is based on a snapshot dated 30 September 2025 and includes five eligibility tracks designed to reward activity rather than low-value farming. According to Monad’s announcement, more than 200,000 addresses qualify. Claiming opened earlier this month and closes shortly before the mainnet launch on 24 November. evidences.title: A Simple Analysis of MON Coin - Binance
evidences.content: Project Financing History According to the sales documents disclosed by the project, Monad's cumulative financing situation is as follows: Pre-Seed: June to December 2022, raised $19.6 million Seed: January to March 2024, raised $22.6 million Series A: March to August 2024, raised $220.5 million Total Cumulative Financing Amount: The total amount raised in the above three rounds is approximately $262.7 million. In addition, the Monad Foundation also received a $90 million donation from its core development entity, Category Labs, in 2024, which is included in the above total financing amount to cover operational expenses for 2024-2026. evidences.title: Monad Price Prediction: Will MON Coin Reach $1 Soon?
evidences.content: Before exchange trading began, a public sale ran between November 17 and 22, 2025 on Coinbase. Tokens sold at $0.025 each. Around 85,820 participants contributed $269 million. Demand exceeded available supply by 144%. This oversubscription signaled intense early interest and strong speculative appetite. On November 24, 2025, the mainnet launch triggered the token generation event. MON debuted on Coinbase, Bybit, Upbit, and Bithumb simultaneously. The opening price reached $0.0329, which stood above the public sale level. Minutes later, aggressive selling pushed the price below $0.025. By the end of the day, MON stabilized near $0.0251. First-day trading volume reached roughly $37.6 million. Early optimism mixed with caution as traders tested liquidity. [...] December 2025 extended the downtrend. Mid-month trading slipped below $0.02. On December 19, MON printed its historical low at $0.0167. This represented a 66% decline from the November peak. Interestingly, network fundamentals improved during the same period. Transactions, active addresses, and total value locked all expanded rapidly. The market still treated MON as a speculative asset rather than a fundamentals-driven one....

evidences.title: Monad token climbs 46% after early dip as Coinbase-sale buyers ...
evidences.content: Advertisement Monad’s MON token traded around $0.0365 by mid-afternoon Monday, up roughly 46% from its $0.025 sale price after recovering from an early slide to about $0.02 shortly after tokens were distributed. It follows the close of Monad's week-long public token sale on Coinbase, the first conducted through the exchange’s new token-launch platform. The offering attracted $269 million in commitments from nearly 86,000 participants, a 1.43× oversubscription of the $187.5 million allocated amount. Monad Token (MON) Price Chart. Source: Coinbase Participants came from more than 70 countries, and Coinbase said internal polling showed most joined for long-term exposure rather than short-term speculation. evidences.title: Coinbase Opens a New Chapter for Token Sales - NCFA Canada
evidences.content: Coinbase has confirmed that Monad (MON) will be the first project to use the new platform, with its token sale scheduled for November 17–22, 2025. A key test of how a compliant, exchange led distribution can work in practice. The design directly addresses problems seen during the 2017–2018 ICO boom, when many projects raised funds without meeting disclosure or compliance standards. Coinbase’s structured, transparent model supports fair access for users while maintaining clear accountability for issuers. ## Then and Now: Token Sales Compared [...] Token Sales | Nov 13, 2025 Image: Freepik/diana.grytsku # A New Standard for Fair and Transparent Token Launches On November 10, 2025 Coinbase announced the launch of its new 2025 end-to-end token sales platform, with the goal is to make token launches more open, fair, and easy to understand, while helping projects build real communities and stable markets. The news is the return of U.S. retail access to public token sales for the first time since 2018, triggered by both market demand and a pro-crypto U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) who now says that most crypto tokens are not securities, a complete pivot from the Gensler...

evidences.title: Monad Token Public Sale Launched on Coinbase, Market ... - KuCoin
evidences.content: Derived from PANews, the public token sale of Monad, a new high-performance Layer 1 blockchain, has officially begun on Coinbase's new token offering platform on November 17. The sale will last until November 22, with tokens expected to be distributed on November 24. As the first project on Coinbase's new platform, Monad is seen as a key experiment in transparent and compliant token issuance. The sale price is set at $0.025 per MON token, with a total of 7.5 billion tokens offered, raising up to $187.5 million. The sale is open to over 80 countries, including Hong Kong, and requires USDC as the only accepted payment method. Coinbase has implemented a fair allocation mechanism prioritizing small investors and limiting large allocations. However, the initial response has been relatively [...] However, the initial response has been relatively slow compared to previous token sales, with only 45% of tokens subscribed within the first six hours. Market prediction platform Polymarket suggests the final raise is likely to fall between $400 million and $1 billion. Meanwhile, Monad's testnet has already launched in 25 countries with 174 validators, and over 300 projects have joined its ec...

evidences.title: How to Join the Monad Public Sale? And Is It Worth It? - LinkedIn
evidences.content: ### I. How to Join the Monad Public Sale？ This public offering will sell 7.5 billion MON tokens at a fixed price of $0.025, with a total fundraising size of $187.5 million. Over 80 countries/regions are eligible to participate, including Hong Kong, China. Below is the complete process and important notes for investors to participate in Monad on the Coinbase public offering platform: Step 1: Account and Identity Verification: Investors must have a Coinbase account and complete KYC. [...] Liquidity is another point of concern. According to public information, Monad has partnered with five market makers. Four of them use a one-month loan with monthly renewal, and only Wintermute provides a one-year commitment. Out of the total supply of 100 billion tokens, only 160 million tokens were borrowed for market making, and the foundation may provide a maximum of another 0.2% for initial DEX liquidity. The overall scale is lower than the industry standard market-making investment, which is typically around 2%. Consequently, some users believe such a cautious market-making scale may be insufficient to absorb significant sell pressure in the initial launch phase, thus affecting price stabili...

evidences.content: The sale is the first direct token offering hosted on Coinbase. It is open to participants in over 80 countries, including the U.S. Early-stage activity was steady but slower than expected. Analysts attribute this to investors waiting for final moments to commit larger funds. Currently, the sale sees an additional $693,500 added each hour. The public sale will close on 23 November at 10:00, just ahead of Monad’s mainnet launch on 24 November 2025. ## What Monad Offers Monad is a high-performance Layer 1 blockchain. It is fully compatible with the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM). It is designed to reach 10,000 transactions per second with near-instant finality.
